_note: JS SvelteKit route files get the same $types injections as TS ones, in JSDoc form (upstream upsertKitFile's !isTsFile branches): an untyped `export function load({ params })` gains `/** @param {import('./$types.js').PageLoadEvent} arg0 */`, so the destructured event members are typed. Two observable effects, both verified byte-identical against upstream svelte-check on a live SvelteKit app: the real property error (TS2339 on `params.nope`) surfaces, and the phantom TS7031 ('Binding element params implicitly has an any type') that an un-injected strict checkJs run produces is gone.
